Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Jethro also encounters a flamingo that he thinks is a chicken (which causes Jed to suspect Jethro has been sneaking drinks of moonshine). programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Wild Shots

From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: Arches & Canyonlands

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

channel.display-name: KESQ ABC News Channel 3 Palm Springs CA

programme.title: Newschannel 3 Live at 6pm
programme.desc: The latest local, regional, statewide and national news updates of the day, as well as detailed and timely reports on sports events, Kalamazoo area weather conditions and rush-hour traffic issues are offered by the NewsChannel 3 Evening Team.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 6:30pm
programme.desc: The veteran CBS Local 2 News Team presents the latest headline news from around the community, along with current and coming weather conditions, up-to-the-minute traffic report, sports highlights and much more for area viewers.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 Live at Five
programme.desc: A comprehensive examination of the major local, regional, state and national news events of the day and issues affecting business, economics, local sports, weather conditions and traffic are presented by the NewsChannel 3 Evening News Team.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 5:30pm
programme.desc: The veteran CBS Local 2 News Team presents the latest headline news from around the community, along with current and coming weather conditions, up-to-the-minute traffic report, sports highlights and much more for area viewers.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 10:00PM
programme.desc: The CBS 4 Nightly News Team presents a report on the major news events of the day and the details of late breaking news stories along with the latest sports updates, Palm Springs area weather conditions and the weather forecast for tomorrow.
